description: SolidJS SPA at packages/app/, built and refreshed by webctl.sh, exposed via the C gateway through two-layer route registration (web_registry.json + web_routes.conf), surfacing the Admin Panel and rich rendering plus dual-path voice input. Shipped (live as of 2026-05-04).

activities.title: Build And Refresh Bundle
activities.description: webctl.sh dev-start / build-frontend / web-refresh orchestration. Vite produces packages/app/dist/, deployed to /usr/local/share/opencode/frontend/.

activities.title: Spawn Dev Servers
activities.description: webctl.sh do_dev_start (~L1162): bun --conditions=browser backend on OPENCODE_PORT=1080 plus Vite frontend on OPENCODE_FRONTEND_DEV_PORT=3000.

activities.title: Deploy And Bounce Gateway
activities.description: webctl.sh web-refresh copies dist/ to /usr/local/share/opencode/frontend/ and restarts opencode-gateway.service so OPENCODE_FRONTEND_PATH is re-read.

activities.title: Register Gateway Route
activities.description: Two-layer route registration: ~/.config/web_registry.json declares user-level entries, /etc/opencode/web_routes.conf is the system-level table mutated by webctl.sh publish-route over /run/opencode-gateway/ctl.sock.

activities.title: Update User Registry
activities.description: Edit ~/.config/web_registry.json (entryName, projectRoot, publicBasePath, host, primaryPort, webctlPath, enabled, access).

activities.title: Publish System Route
activities.description: webctl.sh publish-route writes <prefix> <host> <port> <owner_uid> [auth] into /etc/opencode/web_routes.conf via gateway ctl.sock admin command.

activities.title: Reload Gateway Table
activities.description: Gateway reads conf at start and on SIGHUP, longest-prefix matches incoming requests.

activities.title: Probe Route Health
activities.description: server/routes/web-route.ts tcpProbe(host, port, timeoutMs) feeds the UI per-route health badge.

activities.title: Render SPA Shell
activities.description: src/app.tsx router root with AppShellProviders (Settings/Permission/Layout/Notification/Models/Command/Highlights), authenticated by WebAuthProvider + AuthGate. Routes: /, /system/tasks/:jobId?, /:dir/session/:id?, terminal-popout, tool detail.

activities.title: Authenticate Session
activities.description: WebAuthProvider + AuthGate verify gateway-issued oc_jwt cookie; cross-user login redirect clears localStorage.

activities.title: Mount Provider Stack
activities.description: AppShellProviders wraps Settings → Permission → Layout → Notification → Models → Command → Highlights (app.tsx L102-L141).

activities.title: Resolve Route And Render
activities.description: @solidjs/router resolves URL to Home / TaskList / Session / tool detail / terminal-popout (AppInterface at app.tsx L243).

activities.title: Render Rich Markdown
activities.description: pages/session/markdown-file-viewer.ts detects Mermaid via three fence patterns and renders via mermaid v11.12.0; rich-markdown-surface.tsx + message-file-links.ts make path:line clickable, opening the file tab and updating selected-line state.

activities.title: Drive Admin Panel
activities.description: /admin three-in-one surface combining provider/model management (dialog-manage-models.tsx), accounts.json multi-account view, and App Market dialog. Opened from pages/layout.tsx (L1065).

activities.title: Capture Voice Input
activities.description: Dual-path: desktop SpeechRecognition (utils/speech.ts) with smart-punctuation; mobile MediaRecorder 1s chunks (utils/audio-recorder.ts + transcribe.ts) → POST /api/v2/session/:id/transcribe (server/routes/session.ts ~L2563). Both converge on applyVoiceTranscript() → prompt.set(). voicePath() picked once at mount; no silent re-evaluation.

arrows.label: operator clicks Manage Models / Accounts / App Market
App Market may register new sibling routes
